nodes.title: Welcome to the Clearwater Band of Ojibwe
nodes.heroTitle: Honoring Our Heritage, Building Our Future
nodes.heroSubtitle: Sovereign Nation of the Clearwater Band of Ojibwe

heroDescription.processed: The Clearwater Band of Ojibwe is a sovereign tribal nation dedicated to preserving our cultural heritage, strengthening our community, and building a prosperous future for generations to come.
heroDescription.summary: The Clearwater Band of Ojibwe is a sovereign tribal nation dedicated to preserving our cultural heritage, strengthening our community, and building a prosperous future for generations to come.

ctaDescription.processed: Access tribal services, submit applications, and stay connected with your tribal government through our online member services portal.
ctaDescription.summary: Access tribal services, submit applications, and stay connected with your tribal government through our online member services portal.
